title: RunDialog Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub RunDialog (DialogID As SpelDialogs  [, Parent As Form])
parameters:
DialogID	The ID of
		 the Epson RC+ 8.0 dialog to run.

Parent	Optional.
		  A .NET form that will be the parent of the window.

RunDialog Example

VB
examples:
Sub btnRobotManager_Click( _
       ByVal sender As System.Object, _
       ByVal e As System.EventArgs) _
       Handles btnRobotManager.Click)
    m_spel.RunDialog(SpelDialogs.RobotManager)
End Sub
